title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Sika India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Sika India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sika India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sika India Asia Pacific Associates:
Sika India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sika India Asia Pacific Associates!
